title: Docker API /images/{image}/json is missing Labels (and other data)
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Here - https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/e4e42b28dfef0ffd12f2087048dec61f9cb03976/pkg/api/handlers/types.go#L291-L317 - the Labels field is not wired. This makes tools that expect labels to be present to fail - https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/issues/564

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Download some image
```
$ podman pull heroku/buildpacks:18
$ podman image inspect heroku/buildpacks:18 | jq . | grep Label 
      "Labels": {
    "Labels": {
```
2. Run API server
```
$ podman system service --log-level debug -t 0
```
3. Get image info from the API
```
$ curl -sS --unix-socket $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/podman/podman.sock http:/v1.38/images/index.docker.io/heroku/buildpacks:18/json | jq . | grep Labels
    "Labels": null
    "Labels": null
```

**Describe the results you received:**

No labels.

**Describe the results you expected:**

Include the labels.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.9.0
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.13.9
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```
